data.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment

### Output Contract (from gap analysis)
The --batch mode outputs a JSON array of compiled ticket state dicts to stdout. Each element is the same dict structure as reduce_ticket() returns for a single ticket. For directories where reduce_ticket() returns None, a fallback dict {status: error, error: reducer_failed, ticket_id: <id>} is emitted. Tests should assert on this specific format.

### .test-index Conflict Note
This task and bb93-eeaf both modify .test-index. Each appends a distinct, non-overlapping line. If executed in the same batch, ensure appends are serialized (each adds its own unique mapping line).
